text: Hey it's Carly here and today I just want to show you a fun little sequence that I like to do with the hula hoop.
So this is more for hoop dance but you're still going to get the exercise benefits from it.
So I like to just start waist hooping and turning for three.
Two, three, pull up into a vortex.
Okay, I go down into a stir the pot.
Up into prayer position, use my other hand to pull down into another vortex.
One, two.
I go forward into a stir the pot.
Okay, back up, another one, another vortex.
Another stir the pot.
Only this time I'm doing it in isolation.
Let's do two or three of these.
Then two hands, round.
From here I do a reverse weave.
Weave, weave.
Pass.
Forward weave.
Behind the back.
Okay.
Forward, a little toss.
And from here, row the hoop along the back.
One foot going the other way.
And duck in.
And there you have it.
A wee flow sequence that you try.
Thanks, bye bye.
